title: Redis Enterprise - Database Dashboard
description: Database performance monitoring for Redis Enterprise. Ported from Grafana v2 ops dashboards.

requests.q: top(sum:rdse2.redis_server_up{$cluster, role:master, $db} by {redis, slots, node, status}, 1, 'mean', 'desc')

definition.title: p99.9 Latency (µs) Over Time [read, write, other requests]
